task: BUG-FIX-BATCH-4: BUG-018 + 3 LOW bugs fixed (Settings workdir editor, localStorage warn, trim, prop type)
summary: BUG-FIX-BATCH-4: BUG-018 + 3 LOW bugs fixed (Settings workdir editor, localStorage warn, trim, prop type)
reason: Chairman: '继续修复'. Fixed BUG-018 (the last outstanding MEDIUM) plus 3 quick LOW bugs in one batch. BUG-018 (kv nwt_root staleness): added 'Change workdir' button in Settings > About card. Uses @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog for directory picker (falls back to window.prompt if unavailable), then calls atomic set_workdir_with_nwt + reloads. New workdir prop plumbed from App.tsx to Settings. 4 new i18n keys for both zh-CN and en-US: changeWorkdir, changeWorkdirPrompt, changeWorkdirError, currentWorkdir. BUG-025 (localStorage quota silent failure): App.tsx setRecentCmds now console.warns on quota exceeded instead of silent swallow. BUG-055 (WorkdirSetup onConfirm prop type drift): prop type widened from `(path: string) => void` to `(path: string) => void | Promise<void>` to match App.tsx's actual async usage. BUG-056 (SearchBugPanel trim-on-keystroke UX bug): trim is now applied only on submit (search() does code.trim()) instead of every keystroke; the previous code truncated intermediate whitespace and made typing feel janky. The onChange handler now just uppercases without trimming. Validation: 36/36 E2E tests pass, pnpm typecheck clean, pnpm tauri build --bundles nsis produces Flowntier_0.4.0_x64-setup.exe. Status: 11 of 12 MEDIUM bugs fixed, plus 4 LOW bugs from the ~30 batch. Only BUG-017 (BLOCKING, kv cross-process sync) remains — deferred to v0.5 (architectural change to pipe-server). Polish 17 (animated transitions) still pending as the final v0.4 polish.
